metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2118
metadata.comment:
Rationale: immuno-EM shows postsynaptic localization (Fig.8). additional evidence was added by biochemical fractionation+westernblot (Fig.4).

"The synaptic localization of Hsp40 immunoreactivity in the cerebral cortex was also examined at the electron microscopic level. Postsynaptic structures but not presynaptic structures were stained (Fig. 8). PSDs were immunoreactive but rather weak compared to regions of subsynaptic web. Staining patterns of HSP70 and Hsp40 in the spine were similar."

missing from Figure8 legend, but noted in Figure7 legend;
"(a) and (b) Cerebral cortex, (c) and (d) cerebellum."

HSP40 antibody source; PMID:1586970. Experimental description: "For immunohistochemical examination at the light microscopic level, brains from Wistar rats (males, 4 weeks old) ... "
